LANDING.HERO_SUBTITLE: Premium coworking spaces designed for innovators, creators, and teams. Book your perfect workspace today.
LANDING.SERVICES_DESC: Everything you need to work, create, and grow — all under one roof.
LANDING.CENTERS_DESC: Discover our premium coworking hubs across Morocco.
LANDING.CENTER_CASA_DESC: Our flagship center in the heart of Casablanca's business district. 3 floors of premium workspace.
LANDING.CENTER_RABAT_DESC: Modern workspace near the administrative capital. Ideal for government and tech professionals.
LANDING.CENTER_MARRAKECH_DESC: Creative workspace inspired by the vibrant culture of Marrakech. Perfect for creative teams.
LANDING.PRICING_DESC: No hidden fees. Choose the plan that fits your needs.
LANDING.TESTIMONIAL_1: AIHub transformed how our team works. The spaces are beautiful and the community is incredible.
LANDING.TESTIMONIAL_2: Best coworking experience in Morocco. Fast WiFi, great coffee, and amazing networking opportunities.
LANDING.TESTIMONIAL_3: The private offices are perfect for our team. Professional environment at a very reasonable price.

SERVICES.OPEN_SPACE_DESC: Boost your productivity in our open workspace, featuring flexible workstations and an inspiring environment.
SERVICES.PRIVATE_OFFICE_DESC: Enjoy a fully equipped office with furniture, high-speed internet, printing services, and communal areas.
SERVICES.MEETING_ROOMS_DESC: Utilize our state-of-the-art conference rooms equipped with the latest technology.
SERVICES.CAFETERIA_DESC: Take a break in our cafeteria where you can enjoy refreshments and network.
SERVICES.PODCAST_DESC: Professional recording equipment for your next audio or video production.
SERVICES.TRAINING_DESC: Dedicated spaces for workshops, seminars, and professional development.
SERVICES.DOMICILIATION_DESC: Premium business address and mail handling for your company.
SERVICES.INCUBATOR_DESC: Programs and support to help your startup grow and scale rapidly.

CONTACT.READY_SUBTITLE: Join the most innovative community of developers and tech enthusiasts.

FOOTER.COPYRIGHT: © 2024 AIHub. The modern coworking space for tech & AI.
